observe: There's a narrow stretch ahead. Only one of you gets to cross it at a time. That's not me being strict — that's the rule keeping you both safe.
fault: Two of you tried to cross together. That's exactly what this stretch can't allow.
repair: One at a time. Let the door do its job.
escape: Cross clean, one at a time, before the gate shuts.

observe: Only one process may execute in the critical section at a time.
fault: Multiple processes attempted to enter the critical section simultaneously.
repair: Enforce one-at-a-time access to the critical section.
escape: Complete all required crossings before time expires.

hints: Wait for the gate to fully clear before your own crossing begins.
